REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (160-162 Lower Terrace, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Gene Marchi.

Mr. Schultz announced the terms of the sale for the record. The sale was confirmed at $1,253,000.00 (order for the same signed in open court). No additional bond was required. The buyers being present, confirmed the change in title adding Galina Mazo as a tenant in common.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jackson.

Petition For Authority To List And Sell Settlors Residence
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Karen Mitchell for Ruth Baltzer. Andrew Schultz for Gene Marchi (Trustee/Conservator).

Ms. Mitchell stated that the Conservatee did not want to sell her home and that she wanted to return to her home. Mr. Schultz reported that it costed $7,000.00 per month to pay for the Conservatee's care, that the Court Investigator had been informed and that renting out both units would not generate enough income to pay for her care. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
